description_long: This is a large, ornate battle axe with a dark metallic finish and intricate detailing along the handle and blade. The axe features a double-edged blade with a pronounced curve and a sharp, pointed spike at the top, giving it a menacing appearance. The handle is cylindrical, adorned with decorative rings and geometric patterns, and tapers to a pointed pommel. The blade is asymmetrical, with one side extending further and curving outward, while the other side is shorter and more angular. The entire object has a glossy, almost reflective surface, suggesting it is made from high-quality metal. Subtle gold or brass accents are visible along the handle and blade, enhancing its visual richness.
description: A large, ornate battle axe with a dark metallic finish, double-edged curved blade, and decorative handle with gold accents.
description_view_0: The axe is seen edge-on, showing the thin profile of the blade and the pointed spike at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: The full face of the axe is visible, highlighting the curved double-edged blade, central spike, and detailed handle.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, similar to view 0, showing the thinness of the blade and the symmetry of the handle.
description_view_3: The opposite face of the axe is shown, revealing the blade's curvature, decorative details, and the pointed pommel.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight, metallic handle with decorative rings and geometric patterns, likely steel with gold accents, no visible curvature, grippable.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged, asymmetrical curved blade with a pronounced top spike, one side longer and more curved, decorative cutouts and gold accents.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged or pinned style, with the blade securely fitted onto the handle.
